div.p: Manage your account, instances, and billing from here.
Manage your cloud instances
View your purchase history
View and pay invoices
Password & connection settings
Explore available cloud solutions

t.t-value: [f for f in folders if not f.parent_id]

div.p: Manage your deployed cloud instances

div.class: d-none align-items-center gap-2 p-2 mb-2 info-card

t.p: Move instances here to organize your work.
Deploy your own Odoo project on our managed cloud.
Choose from our ready-made cloud solutions.
Get started with a ready-made service or deploy your own project.

div.p: Your payment is being processed. Your instance will start provisioning once confirmed.

t.p: Your payment was confirmed. Your instance is being set up now. This page will refresh automatically.
This usually takes a few minutes. The page will refresh automatically.

p.t: Your trial ends on . Upgrade to a paid plan before then to keep your instance running.
Your trial is active. Upgrade to a paid plan to keep your instance running.

t.t-if: instance.is_hosting and not instance.is_trial and not instance.daily_backup_enabled and not instance.daily_backup_pending_invoice_id

div.strong: Protect this instance with daily snapshots
div.p: Daily snapshots capture every database, your uploaded files, your custom modules and your instance settings — one click to roll back to any earlier point. Up to 7 snapshots kept (the oldest is dropped automatically). Billed monthly as an add-on.

t.t-if: instance.is_hosting and not instance.is_trial and instance.daily_backup_pending_invoice_id

div.p: Complete the activation invoice to start the nightly snapshot cron.
Complete your payment to activate this instance.
Your upgrade to is being applied. This page will refresh automatically.
You selected the plan (). Complete your payment to apply the upgrade, or choose a different plan.

button.data-confirm: Cancel this upgrade? Your current plan will remain unchanged.

t.p:
Your billing will switch from to
on your next billing cycle
() . Your plan () stays the same.

Your plan will change from
() to
() at the end of your current billing cycle
() .

button.t-att-data-confirm: 'Cancel this billing period change and keep your current settings?' if is_period_switch else 'Cancel the scheduled downgrade and keep your current plan?'
button.t-att-data-confirm-yes: 'Yes, cancel change' if is_period_switch else 'Yes, cancel downgrade'

div.t-attf-class: progress-bar #{'bg-success' if cpu_pct < 60 else 'bg-warning' if cpu_pct < 80 else 'bg-danger'}
progress-bar #{'bg-success' if ram_pct < 60 else 'bg-warning' if ram_pct < 80 else 'bg-danger'}
progress-bar #{'bg-success' if storage_pct < 60 else 'bg-warning' if storage_pct < 80 else 'bg-danger'}

div.p: Resource usage is not available while the instance is . Start the instance to view live metrics.

t.t-if: not recent_upgrade_inv and rinv.payment_state in ('paid', 'in_payment') and 'credit' in (rinv.invoice_line_ids[:1].name or '').lower() and rinv.create_date and rinv.create_date >= credit_notice_cutoff

div.p: Your remaining balance from the previous plan was deducted from the upgrade cost. See invoice for the full breakdown.

t.t-value: inv.state == 'posted' and inv.payment_state not in ('paid', 'in_payment') and inv.amount_residual > 0

t.div: Includes credit for unused days on previous plan

button.data-confirm: Cancel this invoice and the pending upgrade?

div.p: Invoices will appear here once you subscribe to a paid plan.

t.t-if: not instance.is_trial and instance.state == 'running' and not backup_running

t.p: Backups are not available on the trial plan

form.data-loading-text: Restoring your instance from the snapshot…
form.data-loading-subtitle: This can take several minutes. Please don't close the tab — the page will refresh when it's done.

button.data-confirm: Restore your instance from this backup? Current data will be replaced.

div.p: Create your first backup to protect your data.

button.data-confirm: Create a new backup of your instance?

div.p: Reactivating brings your instance back on the same subdomain. We kept your most recent snapshot — after reactivation you can re-enable Daily Backups from the Snapshots page and restore it yourself.
Payment received. Your data is being restored now. This page will refresh automatically.
Your data restore has been prepared. Pay the restoration fee to start the restore process. Your data will be restored automatically after payment.

t.t-if: instance.retained_backup_path and not instance.restore_banner_dismissed and instance.state in ('running', 'stopped') and not instance.restoration_invoice_id

div.p: A backup of your previous data is available. If you'd like to restore it, send a request to our support team. A restoration fee may apply.

t.t-value: not instance.is_trial and instance.state not in ('cancelled', 'cancelled_by_client', 'draft', 'pending_payment')

button.data-confirm: Remove the saved card? Auto-renew will be disabled until you add a new card.

t.div: No card on file. Pay your next invoice with "Save my card" ticked to enable auto-renew.

div.label:
Auto-renew subscription
Charge the saved card on each renewal.

Auto-renew Daily Backups
Charge the saved card on the monthly add-on invoice.

t.div: Auto-renew toggles unlock once a card is saved.

div.label: Access Token

input.name: git_token
input.t-att-placeholder: 'Token configured' if repo and repo.sudo().github_token else 'ghp_xxxxxxxxxxxx'

div.div: Required for private repos and auto-updates. Leave empty to keep current token.

button.data-confirm: Save repository settings and restart your instance?
Pull latest code and restart your instance?
Remove the repository from your instance? The instance will restart without custom modules.

textarea.name: pip_packages
textarea.placeholder: One package per line e.g. phonenumbers openpyxl

form.div: Your installed packages. Add or remove packages and save to apply. One per line.

button.data-confirm: Save packages and restart your instance to apply changes?

div.p: Your trial instance is currently on the plan (Free Trial). Configure your resources below to keep your data and instance running.

ul.li: Your data and configuration are preserved

div.p: Secure payment powered by SSL encryption
Adjust your resources. Upgrades take effect immediately. Worker reductions take effect at your next billing cycle.

Your plan will change to
() at the end of your billing cycle
() .

button.data-confirm: Cancel the scheduled change and keep your current plan?

div.div:
Worker reduction will take effect at your next billing cycle
()
Storage cannot be reduced below current allocation (GB)

div.p: Reactivate with the same subdomain and domain.

Configure your plan and pay the invoice to reactivate. Your instance will be redeployed empty — your most recent snapshot is kept safely. Once the instance is running, open the Snapshots page, re-enable Daily Backups (one-time activation invoice includes a small retention surcharge), and click Restore to bring your data back yourself. No support ticket needed.

p.t: Daily full-instance snapshots are enabled. Up to most recent snapshots are kept (oldest rolled off). The cron fires at 03:00 UTC.
Daily snapshots are pending payment. Complete the invoice to start the 03:00 UTC cron. Per-database backups remain available on the Databases page.
Daily snapshots are off. Per-database backups live on the Databases page.

t.p: This instance is cancelled. Your most recent snapshot is kept safely. Reactivate the instance to restore it.

t.t-if: instance.is_hosting and not instance.is_trial and not _is_cancelled

span.title: Daily backups are active. To turn this off, contact support.

div.t: Backup of '' in progress. Refresh in a moment — only one on-demand backup is allowed at a time.

A backup of '' is ready. The link stays live for the full 8-hour window
(expires at )
so a failed download can be retried. Only one on-demand backup is allowed at a time — discard this one if you need to request a fresh dump immediately.
Download
Discard

div.p: Your most recent snapshot is kept safely in our cloud storage. To restore it, reactivate this instance from the instance page, then re-enable Daily Backups and click Restore.

t.t-if: instance.is_hosting and not instance.is_trial and not _is_cancelled and not instance.daily_backup_enabled and full_instance_backups

div.strong: Enable Daily Backups to restore your snapshots.
div.p: Your snapshots are kept safely in cloud storage, but Restore is part of the Daily Snapshots add-on. Enable it (and complete the activation payment) to unlock the Restore button on every snapshot below.

div.data-loading-text: Restoring your instance from the snapshot…
div.data-loading-subtitle: This can take several minutes. The page will refresh automatically when your instance is back online.

div.small: Up to 7 snapshots, oldest rolled off

div.p:
Each snapshot captures every database on your instance, the uploaded files and attachments, your custom modules and your instance settings — stored encrypted in our cloud storage. Restoring rolls the entire instance back to that point in time without creating a new snapshot, so your list stays exactly as you see it.
Snapshots aren't directly downloadable. For a portable copy of a single database, use Backup Now on the Databases page.

a.title: Enable Daily Backups to restore this snapshot

form.data-loading-text: Restoring your instance from the snapshot…
form.data-loading-subtitle: This can take several minutes. Please don't close the tab — the page will refresh automatically when your instance is back online.

div.p: This will replace every database, every uploaded file, your custom modules and your instance settings on with the snapshot from .
Restoring rolls your instance back in place — no new snapshot is created and your snapshot list stays as you see it. Your instance will be unavailable for several minutes while the restore runs.
To confirm, retype the subdomain :

No snapshots yet.
Enable daily snapshots above to start capturing restore points.

button.t-att-title: 'Backup of ' + active_ondemand.db_name + ' ' + ('is running' if active_ondemand.state == 'running' else 'is waiting for download')

form.data-loading-text: Restoring your database from the snapshot…
form.data-loading-subtitle: This can take several minutes. Please don't close the tab — the page will refresh automatically when your instance is back online.

div.p: This will replace the current contents of with the backup taken on .

t.p: Other databases on this instance stay online during the restore.
The instance will be unavailable for a few minutes.

div.p: To confirm, retype the database name :

Daily snapshots of your full instance for . Captures every database, your uploaded files, your custom modules and your instance settings on each run; keeps up to 7 most recent snapshots (the oldest is dropped automatically). Billed as a flat monthly fee with no proration — the same amount is charged whether you enable on the 1st or the 28th. Charged again on every renewal while the feature is on.

tr.td:
Daily Backups Add-on Monthly
Flat monthly fee — no proration. Once enabled, the next charge is one full month after today's payment.

Snapshot retention fee
One-time charge for keeping your most recent snapshot in cloud storage through the cancellation period — paid once on first activation after reactivation.

div.p:
Invoice: . You can pay any time from
the invoice page
too.

div.data-loading-subtitle: This page will refresh automatically when it's done. Please don't close the tab.

div.class: alert-banner alert-info mb-2 d-flex justify-content-between align-items-start gap-3

div.t: Repairing on ''… the database is briefly unavailable while this runs.

button.title: Clear this banner. The background worker (if any) keeps running.

div.class: alert-banner alert-danger mb-2 d-flex justify-content-between align-items-start gap-3

div.div:
Create Duplicate Delete
Repair of on
of '' failed
at .
Show full report

div.class: alert-banner alert-success mb-2 d-flex justify-content-between align-items-start gap-3

div.div:
Repair of on '' completed
at .
Show full report

div.p: No databases yet. Click Create Database to add your first.

span.t-att-title: 'Link expires at ' + active_ondemand.expires_at.strftime('%H:%M UTC') if active_ondemand and active_ondemand.expires_at else ''

button.t-att-title: 'Backup of ' + active_ondemand.db_name + ' is in progress. Only one on-demand backup ' + 'is allowed at a time — wait for it to ' + 'finish.'

button.t-att-data-confirm: ('Taking a new backup will delete the existing one for ' + active_ondemand.db_name + '. Continue?') if active_ondemand else None

button.title: Reset the admin password for this database
Repair a feature on this database — use this if the database is showing an error page and the in-app Apps update is unavailable.

form.data-loading-subtitle: This usually takes about a minute. Please don't close the tab — the page will refresh automatically.

div.label: Database name

input.name: name
input.title: Lowercase letters, digits, single hyphens or underscores between groups. Starts with a letter. At least 3 characters.

div.div: Lowercase letters, digits, single hyphens or underscores between groups. Starts with a letter, ends with a letter or digit. The full database name will be _ followed by what you type.

div.p: Copies this database — along with all uploaded files and attachments — under a new name. The original stays untouched.

input.name: new_name
input.title: Lowercase letters, digits, single hyphens or underscores between groups. Starts with a letter. At least 3 characters.

div.p: Replaces the password of the database's admin user (the one created when the database was initialised). Use this when you've forgotten it — no current-password proof is required. Other users on the database are not affected.

t.div:
Admin login for this database:
— sign in with this login and the new password once the reset completes.
Couldn't determine the admin login for this database. The reset will still work — the actual login will be shown in the success banner.

form.data-loading-subtitle: Your instance will be briefly unavailable. The page will refresh automatically when it's done.

div.div: Recovery tool — use this when your instance shows an error page and you can't reach the Apps update from inside the database. We will re-install the chosen feature and bring the instance back up. Your instance will be briefly unavailable while this runs (usually 30 seconds to a few minutes).

div.label: Feature to repair

input.name: module
input.title: Lowercase letters, digits and underscores. Use 'all' to repair every installed feature.

div.div: Common picks: base (rebuild the core), web (rebuild the interface), all (repair every installed feature — slower but the broadest fix), or the name of a specific feature like account / sale if you know which one started failing.

div.p: This cannot be undone. The database and every file uploaded to it will be deleted permanently.
To confirm, retype the database name :
